# `pdf/worker/engines/FontRegistry.ts`

## 📋 Purpose

In-memory registry of fonts extracted from the PDF. Maps font checksum → font data (ArrayBuffer) + name. Used by TextEngine and WasmShaper.

> **Source file:** `src/pdf/worker/engines/FontRegistry.ts`

---
## 📐 Interfaces & Types

### `RegisteredFont`

```typescript
name: string;
data: Uint8Array;
mimetype: string;
```
